scope.description: If specified as effective or not specified, all export fields are shown.  If specified as user, only fields with non-default values are shown.

PUT_args.description: Modify the export. All input fields are optional, but one or more must be supplied.

force.description: If true, the export will be updated even if that change conflicts with another export.

resource_description: This resource applies the standard collection pattern to individual NFS exports.  EID in the resource path is the export ID.
